1.solution:
Speed ratios: A:B=300:250=6:5; A:C=300:268=75:67.
In 600m from scratch when A finishes: B at 600أ—5/6=500m, C at 600أ—67/75=536m.
When C runs remaining 64m, B runs 64أ—(B_speed/C_speed)=64أ—(5/6)/(67/75)=64أ—125/134â‰ˆ59.7m.
B at 500+59.7=559.7m when C finishes. C beats B by 600âˆ’559.7=2700/67â‰ˆ40m.
Answer: 40.

2.solution:
Bell interval=12min5s=725s. Steve hears interval=10min55s=655s (shorter because moving toward church).
Doppler: 725أ—(1âˆ’v/330)=655 â†’ 70=725v/330 â†’ v=70أ—330/725=23100/725=31.86 m/s.
31.86â‰ 32 or any other option.
Answer: D (None of these).

3.solution:
Let s=S speed, g=G speed. Case1: 775/gâˆ’800/s=30 (S beats G by 30s). Case2: s(800/gâˆ’40)=760 (G gets 40s start, G beats S by 40m).
Let r=s/g. Substituting: 800râˆ’(4/3)(775râˆ’800)=760 â†’ âˆ’700r/3+3200/3=760 â†’ r=920/700=46/35.
g=(775أ—46/35âˆ’800)أ—35/(30أ—46)=7650/1380=255/46â‰ˆ5.54 m/s.
Answer: B (5.54 m/s).

4.solution:
Overstretched=actualâˆ’planned=(32+t)âˆ’t=32=16t/5 â†’ t=10min. Tortoise speed=v.
Rabbit thought: after sleeping t, still beats by 20min â†’ 3200/vâˆ’t=20 â†’ 3200/v=30 â†’ v=320/3 m/min.
Tortoise total time=4000/v=4000أ—3/320=37.5 min.
Answer: D (37.5 min).

5.solution:
8 bikes in lanes 1â€“8 (A=lane1,...,H=lane8). Speedsâˆ‌(lane)آ². C(lane3) takes 100h for 705600km â†’ C speed=7056km/h=784أ—9 â†’ unit=784km/h.
A speed=784أ—1آ²=784km/h. H speed=784أ—8آ²=784أ—64=50176km/h.
Ratio A:H=784:50176=1:64. m=1, n=64 (coprime). m+n=65.
Answer: 65.

6.solution:
Time=705600/speed. E(lane5):speed=784أ—25=19600â†’time=36h (not <36). F(lane6):speed=28224â†’time=25hâœ“. G(lane7):speed=38416â†’timeâ‰ˆ18.4hâœ“. H(lane8):speed=50176â†’timeâ‰ˆ14.1hâœ“.
Bikes finishing in <36h: F, G, H = 3 bikes.
Answer: C (3).

7.solution:
G is in lane 7, speed=784أ—49=38416km/h. F is in lane 6, speed=784أ—36=28224km/h.
G's speed > F's speed â†’ G finishes before F. F can never beat G.
Answer: D (F can never beat G).

8.solution:
Speed ratio P:A=3:8. At t=3h: Prakash at 9k, Abhay at 24k. Abhay turns back at speed 3/8أ—8k=3k.
Both now move toward each other at 3k each. Gap=15k, combined speed=6k â†’ meet in 15k/6k=5/2h.
Prakash position=9k+3kأ—5/2=16.5k=33km â†’ k=2. Prakash speed=3أ—2=6km/h.
Answer: 6.

9.solution:
Speeds in AP: vâ‚پ,vâ‚‚,vâ‚ƒ,vâ‚„ over 4 hours. Average speed=(vâ‚پ+vâ‚‚+vâ‚ƒ+vâ‚„)/4=(vâ‚پ+vâ‚„)/2=(vâ‚‚+vâ‚ƒ)/2.
The average lies between vâ‚‚ and vâ‚ƒ (speed in 2nd and 3rd hours) for any AP with positive common difference.
Answer: B (between 2 and 3 hour).

10.solution:
Bhairav:Akshay=1600:1344=25:21. Bhairav:Chinmay=100:92=25:23.
In 3200m (2 miles): when Bhairav finishes, Chinmay at 3200أ—23/25=2944m, Akshay at 3200أ—21/25=2688m.
When Chinmay finishes 3200m, Akshay runs 3200أ—(21/23)=2921.7m.
Chinmay beats Akshay by 3200âˆ’3200أ—21/23=3200أ—2/23=6400/23â‰ˆ278.26m.
Answer: D (Chinmay, 278.26 m).
